pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh lines 24-27) explicitly creates asset with this exact name via SQL INSERT. Confirmed in export_result.sh (line 21) and verifier.py (line 78).

Task setup script (setup_task.sh lines 30-33) explicitly creates third party vendor with this exact name via SQL INSERT. Confirmed in export_result.sh (line 22) and verifier.py (line 74). Workday Inc. is a real company (cloud-based SaaS for HR and Finance management, founded 2005, publicly traded on NYSE with ticker WDAY), but is used here as synthetic test data.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses two synthetic test data entries: an asset named 'HR Employee Portal' and a vendor record named 'Workday Inc.' Both are created during task setup via SQL INSERT statements into the Eramba GRC database. The vendor name references the real company Workday Inc. (a SaaS provider for HR and Finance), but the data relationship itself is synthetic. The asset name 'HR Employee Portal' is entirely fictional and created only for this test scenario.
